summary: Video set to a sung track (audible lyric fragment 'Where skies are on...'). It cuts between a slow-motion shot of Trump and family members standing in front of a large rippling red and white American flag, a backlit close-up of Trump smiling at a podium in a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, an election-night graphic reading 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT' with a Georgia results bar (Harris 48.4%, Trump 50.8%), a shot of Trump and a woman seen from behind walking into a room lit red and gold, and a closing black card with a white line drawing of the White House and the text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

script.scene: Slow-motion shot from behind of Trump and family members standing in front of a large rippling red and white American flag. Music plays; lyric '...where skies are...'
Backlit close-up of Trump smiling at a podium microphone, wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap and pink tie; a crowd is behind him.
Election-night graphic: 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT' with a checkmarked Trump photo and a Georgia results bar (Harris 48.4%, Trump 50.8%).
Shallow-focus shot lit red and gold of Trump and a woman seen from behind walking into a room with ornate decor.
End card on black: white line drawing of the White House with the text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN; FOX NEWS PROJECTS TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT; GEORGIA PRESIDENT HARRIS 48.4% TRUMP 50.8%; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; tweet: 'Back to loving America again'
